summary: Phase 1 Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Tested: 1) /freunde-werben route displays new ReferFriendsPage component, 2) Contact, FAQ, HowItWorks pages use dynamic light theme, 3) Admin auction creation with 'Tage' (days) duration option available.

freunde_werben_routing.component_displayed: PASS - ReferFriendsPage component displayed with 'Freunde werben' heading
freunde_werben_routing.unauthenticated_view: PASS - Shows login prompt for unauthenticated users

contact_page_theme.light_theme: PASS - Uses light cyan gradient background (rgb(236, 254, 255) to rgb(207, 250, 254))
contact_page_theme.form_elements: PASS - Contact form with name, email, message fields present

faq_page_theme.light_theme: PASS - Uses light cyan gradient background
faq_page_theme.heading: PASS - 'Häufig gestellte Fragen' heading displayed
faq_page_theme.search_input: PASS - Search input with 'Fragen durchsuchen...' placeholder

how_it_works_page_theme.light_theme: PASS - Uses light cyan gradient background
how_it_works_page_theme.heading: PASS - 'So funktioniert BidBlitz' heading displayed
how_it_works_page_theme.step_cards: PASS - 4 step cards (Registrieren, Gebote kaufen, Bieten, Gewinnen) displayed

admin_auction_duration.admin_login: PASS - Admin login with admin@bidblitz.de works
admin_auction_duration.tage_option: PASS - 'Tage' (days) option available - 1 Tag duration works

code_review.App.js_routing: PASS - /freunde-werben route correctly maps to ReferFriendsPage component (line 507)
code_review.ReferFriends.js: PASS - New component with data-testid='refer-friends-page', uses light theme styling
code_review.Contact.js_theme: PASS - Uses useTheme hook, isDarkMode conditional styling for light/dark mode
code_review.FAQ.js_theme: PASS - Uses useTheme hook, isDarkMode conditional styling for light/dark mode
code_review.HowItWorks.js_theme: PASS - Uses useTheme hook, isDarkMode conditional styling for light/dark mode
code_review.AdminAuctions.js_duration: PASS - Duration dropdown includes 'days' option, conversion logic handles 86400 seconds per day

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 bug fixes verified: 1) /freunde-werben now shows ReferFriendsPage instead of old ReferralDashboard, 2) Contact, FAQ, HowItWorks pages all use useTheme hook for dynamic light/dark mode support, 3) Admin auction creation form has 'Tage' (days) option in duration dropdown. All pages display correctly with light cyan gradient theme.
